title: micranthes atrata
intro: Micranthes atrata, also known as alpine violet or purple saxifrage, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the saxifrage family. It is native to high-altitude areas in the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Micranthes atrata is often used as a salve or tincture to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation, providing health benefits such as accelerated recovery and reduced scarring.
